column1: # cmaes_one_generation.csv -- golden values for the CMA-ES single-generation pin.
# generator: The offspring rows are NOT captured from the library sampler. They
#            are produced by an independent offline replay of the engine and the
#            draw path in exact arithmetic: splitmix64 seeding + xoshiro256+
#            transform with log(s) evaluated by a correctly-rounded >= 200-bit
#            reference and rounded to double. The committed offspring are thus
#            the platform-neutral center of the libm envelope
#            cross-checked with an independent numpy replay of the same equations.
#            Update ordering follows pycma purecma.tell: the covariance C is adapted
#            using the SAMPLING sigma (rank-mu vectors y_i = (x_i - mean_old)/sigma_old)
#            and sigma is adapted after C.
# version:  The draw stream is deterministic across platforms by construction --
#           every step of the uniform mapping is exact in IEEE-754 binary64
#           only residual cross-platform variation is the libm log
#           ULP. If the sampler mapping or the seeding changes
#           offspring rows and the downstream values with the independent replay
#           them from the code under test.
